arts.ttl: Sonia Bompastor happy with Chelsea efficiency after win over Twente
arts.sum: The England forward James sustained a foot issue during the warm-up.

arts.ttl: Preview: RKC Waalwijk vs. FC Twente - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Eredivisie clash between RKC Waalwijk and FC Twente, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Chelsea cruise past Twente as Bompastor maintains perfect start
arts.sum: Sonia Bompastor continued her 100 per cent record since taking charge at Chelsea as her side beat Twente 3-1 to secure a second Women's Champions League win of the season.
